fullName: Ritvo Autism Asperger Diagnostic Scale - Revised
source: Ritvo et al. 2011, J Autism Dev Disord 41(8):1076-1089
copyright: Riva Ariella Ritvo, Ph.D. and Edward Ritvo, M.D., 2007
instructions: Some life experiences and personality characteristics that may apply to you. Check only one column for each statement.

scoring.cutoffMeaning: A score of 65 or greater is consistent with a clinical diagnosis of ASD (sensitivity 97%, specificity 100% per Ritvo et al. 2011). Scores below 65 do not exclude ASD; clinical judgment takes precedence.

items.text: I am a sympathetic person.

responses.label: True now and when I was young
True only now
True only when I was younger than 16
Never true
